architecture: independent daemons (1 process/agent, elite district) + async runners (thousands of self-scheduled coroutines)
honest_note: Each angeal runs on its OWN timer, watches the oracle feed, DECIDES for itself, and signs with its OWN key (initiator:self) — no central round() triggers it. This is genuine, recomputable per-agent autonomy: kill the central loops and these still fire. The unique point: 0n1x is the only fleet where agents actually run as independent angeals, live + signed.
